D0160_TOT_SVRTY_SCRE_NUM Total severity score Indicates the patient's total severity score. 02-27 - Total severity score
99 - Unable to complete the interview CHAR 2 x
D0700_SCL_ISLTN_CD Social Isolation Indicates how often the patient feels lonely or isolated from those around them. 0. Never 
1. Rarely 
2. Sometimes 
3. Often 
4. Always 
8. Patient
